case_title: U.S BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. ELLEN PORSHE ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-06-2023 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-07-2023 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
